work.title: Founding Frontend & Web3 Dev (Remote)
work.description:
Developed the MVP of Assurative, an On-chain lending protocol built on base network which helped people earn guaranteed yield on their money . 

Ensured seamless user experience and web3 functionality.

Worked and integrated Wallets like Privy  also worked closely with Gnosis safes with tooling like Safe Global and PalmeraDAO . Integrated payments too.

Currently retained as an founding advisor ....

work.title: Backend Developer (Remote)
work.description:
Developed the entire backend for Aranyaaa's clothing web application using PHP and MySQL. Worked closely with the team for seamless integration with frontend. 

Also led digital marketing for the web app SEO , keyword searching etc...

work.title: Full Stack Dev & Digital Marketer (On-Site)
work.description: Helped Angelbells increase their online sales for their clothing brand on marketplaces like Amazon , Flipkart, Myntra . Also led online marketing on instagram, facebook, google via running ads to generate leads, keyword searching. Also leaded the web app development for the brand.

work.title: Student (On-Site)
work.description: Got to be a part of 100xSchool Super30 3.0 batch which is an intense 6 month sprint program of shipping things . The goal is to accelerate my learnings , meet great people , attend IRL hackathons , do things i have always missed out on and ship ship ship !

projects.title: Finlearn AI
projects.description: For the Perplexity AI Hackathon, my team and I built Finlearn AI — a platform that adapts to your learning style and financial goals, delivering personalized education that sticks.

projects.title: ABS Finance
projects.description: For the Breakout Hackathon by Colosseum, my team and I built ABS Finance — an AI-powered tool that finds and allocates your assets to the highest-yielding opportunities across Solana vaults.

projects.title: Solanautics
projects.description: For the Redacted Hackathon by Solana, my team and I built Solanautics — a tool using the Solscan API that helps you stay updated, track wallets, follow smart money, and set price alerts. Won 3rd place.

projects.title: ApturaX
projects.description: For the Metamove AI Hackathon, my team and I built ApturaX — an AI Agent on Aptos for X (Twitter) that delivers real-time updates about the Aptos chain.

hackathons.title: Solana Radar
hackathons.description: Developed an on-chain lending platform in DeFi that helps people earn yield.

education.description: Joined Brilliko institute after my 7th class with a lot of curiosity about tech. Started with Graphic designing then video editing and VFX , all that lead to digital marketing . After covering multi-media got into coding with python , HTML & CSS after that it became a different journey with non stop building and learning things in the world of programming built backend systems in PHP . Also landed a internship with a role of graphic designer . Also won multiple certificates and trophies in the span of 3 years .

Completed the Web Development + DevOps +
Blockchain Cohort, Built and learnt about Web Application Development ,  System Deployment and Blockchain based technologies.
